search_query: why abc canceled ellen after coming out
combined_text: ABC Is Canceling 'Ellen' Arts ABC Is Canceling 'Ellen'By BILL CARTER APRIL 25, 1998ABC confirmed yesterday that it had canceled the comedy ''Ellen,'' a year after the show made television history when its lead character, played by Ellen De Generes, declared she was a lesbian.
